title: Hdticket's healthbars
description: A basic mod that shows mobs health and name in the top right of the screen
body:
This is a very simple mod which adds one thing. Health bars. When you look at any mob. it will show the mob in the top right with the name and health. it works with every creature even modded ones!

This mod will be one of my many mods that are made to hopefull revitalise the old age of modding! where everything was abnormal and crazy! instead of vanilla +

I hope you enjoy this as theres more to come!

if you have any suggestions or want to talk make sure to join the official discord:
https://discord.gg/7Ks8cgVcxD https://discord.gg/7Ks8cgVcxD
